title: Auto-save after entering text and restore draft on return within 24 hours
description: Verifies that entering text triggers draft persistence and that the draft is restored on returning to /report within the same session window.

steps.description: Fill "autosave check" into a text field
Click a navigation link to leave the report page
Click the navigation link/menu to return to the report page

title: Successful submission clears the saved draft and shows success confirmation
description: Verifies that after a successful report submission, the user sees a success confirmation and the draft is cleared (not restored on revisit).

steps.description: Click the navigation link/menu to return to the report page

title: Submission error keeps draft for retry and shows error message
description: Verifies that when submission fails, an error is shown and the draft remains available (restores on returning to /report).

steps.description: Click a navigation link to leave the report page
Click the navigation link/menu to return to the report page
Verify element visible "previously entered draft values restored"
